commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the children of Israel did secretly those things that were not right against the LORD their God, and they built them high places in all their cities, from the tower of the watchmen to the fortified city. Hebrew, "They concealed (or spoke secretly; Haydock) words, which were not right before the Lord: "(Calmet) being guilty of hypocrisy or of blasphemy. (Haydock) Watchmen: the meanest huts. (Tirinus) All was contaminated. (Calmet) Towers were erected to guard the flocks from thieves, 2 Paralipomenon xxvi. (Menochius).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
